title: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools
defaultDescription:
Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools are excellence-driven private primary schools, fully registered with the Ministry of Education and Sports and accredited with UNEB centre numbers. We are committed to providing quality education to both Ugandan and international learners through the Ugandan curriculum while fostering academic excellence, discipline, creativity, and innovation.

At Sir Apollo Kaggwa Schools, we believe that education extends beyond the classroom. Through our comprehensive talent development programme, we identify, nurture, and develop learners' unique abilities in sports, music, dance, drama, leadership, technology, and other co-curricular activities.

We also equip our learners with essential life skills, critical thinking abilities, and strong moral values that prepare them to thrive in an ever-changing world. Through our holistic approach to education, we nurture confident, responsible, and productive citizens who are empowered to excel academically, realize their full potential, and make a meaningful contribution to society.
